title: Opening for Store Manager at Nerolac Select Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Nerolac Select Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Nerolac Select Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nerolac Select Capital India:
Nerolac Select Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select Capital India!
